text: The word ‘elders’ here may also be translated ‘presbyters’.
Cf. Ez. 1.5-11. These figures were identified by some of the earliest Christian writers as representing the four Evangelists.

vv. 5-10: All the verbs in these sentences, except one, are in past tenses, according to our version. The Greek, and some manuscripts of the Latin, give the present tense in verses 5-8, the future in verses 9 and 10.
